topic: A basement floods with warm clean water every night and is completely dry again by dawn.
title: My Basement Floods Every Single Night | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every night my basement fills with warm clean water, and by dawn it is bone dry.
scenes.image_prompt: a dim basement half filled with still clear water reflecting a single bulb, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is a plain concrete basement under a plain house.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty gray concrete basement with a water heater and stairs, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: No leaks. No drains. No source.
scenes.image_prompt: a dry concrete basement floor with no drains visible, dim bulb light, soft shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first night I found it knee deep and warm as a bath.
scenes.image_prompt: still warm water rising knee high in a dim basement, faint steam, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The water was clear. It tasted clean.
scenes.image_prompt: clear calm water surface in a basement reflecting a hanging bulb, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each night the level rose higher, always gone by morning, the floor perfectly dry.
scenes.image_prompt: a completely dry basement floor in dim morning light, faint water line on the wall, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I dropped a coin in one night and marked the spot.
scenes.image_prompt: a coin sinking through clear water in a flooded basement, ripples spreading, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning the coin was gone, and so was every drop.
scenes.image_prompt: a dry basement floor with a chalk mark and no coin, dim light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The water rose to the ceiling now, pressing against the floor above.
scenes.image_prompt: a basement filled nearly to the ceiling with still clear water, submerged bulb glowing, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I saw something float up through it, slow, and look toward the stairs.
scenes.image_prompt: a dim shape suspended deep in flooded basement water near a staircase, low light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I padlocked the basement door. The lock is wet every morning.
scenes.image_prompt: a closed basement door with a padlock dripping water onto the floor, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The water line climbs the stairs a little higher each night now.
scenes.image_prompt: wet stair treads ascending from a dark basement, a damp mark higher than before, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
